title: Data Points
description: Data contract for data_points.json output from Research Agent. Consumed by DataViz Agent and Story Arc Designer.

topic.description: The research topic that produced these data points

collected_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the data was collected

data_points.description: Map of named data series, keyed by identifier. Keys correspond to data_viz.data_key values in story_arc.json.

data_point.title: Data Point Series
data_point.description: A named data series with one or more labeled numeric values

label.description: Human-readable display name for this data series

description.description: Optional explanation of what this data series represents or how it was collected

unit.description: Optional unit of measurement for the values

values.description: Array of labeled data points in this series

source.description: Attribution string for the data source (e.g., publication, organization, report name)

source_url.description: Optional URL linking to the original data source

is_simulated.description: If true, values are simulated/estimated rather than from a real source. DataViz Agent must display '[시뮬레이션 데이터]' label.

data_value.title: Data Value
data_value.description: A single labeled numeric value within a data series

label.description: Category label or axis label for this data point (e.g., year, region, category name)

value.description: Numeric value for this data point
